title: tephrosia manikensis
intro: Tephrosia manikensis, also known as Manikari or Manikar, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to India and Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Tephrosia manikensis include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and acting as an antiseptic. Tephrosia manikensis is commonly used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, to treat various health conditions.
